basic_milestones.label: Respawn 1
basic_milestones.instruction: RESPAWN 1: Replace the first basic enemy slain at end of each round.

basic_milestones.label: Respawn 2
basic_milestones.instruction: RESPAWN 2: Replace the first TWO basic enemies slain at end of each round.

basic_milestones.label: Respawn 3
basic_milestones.instruction: RESPAWN 3: Replace the first THREE basic enemies slain at end of each round.

basic_milestones.label: Strength 3
basic_milestones.instruction: STRENGTH 3: +2 basic enemies, +1 Lieutenant per encounter.

basic_milestones.label: Respawn 4
basic_milestones.instruction: RESPAWN 4: Replace the first FOUR basic enemies slain at end of each round.

basic_milestones.label: Respawn 5 + Strength 4
basic_milestones.instruction: RESPAWN 5 + STRENGTH 4: Replace first FIVE slain. +2 basic, +1 specialist, +1 Lieutenant per encounter.

advanced_milestones.label: Strength-Adjusted Enemies
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Enable Strength-Adjusted Enemies. Enemy count = crew size + modifiers.

advanced_milestones.label: Deployment Variables
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Enable Deployment Variables. Roll D6 for deployment modifications.

advanced_milestones.label: Actually Specialized + Better Leadership
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Specialists get min Combat +1, Toughness 4. Unique Individuals roll 7+ (not 9+).

advanced_milestones.label: Escalating Battles
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Enable Escalating Battles. Check for reinforcements each round.

advanced_milestones.label: Armored Leaders + Veteran
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Lieutenants get 5+ Armor Save. 1 basic enemy gets +1 Combat Skill.

advanced_milestones.label: Elite Enemies (4+)
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Roll D6 for each enemy group - on 4+, upgrade to Elite.

advanced_milestones.label: Elite Enemies (3+)
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: Roll D6 for each enemy group - on 3+, upgrade to Elite.

advanced_milestones.label: Elite Enemies (Always)
advanced_milestones.instruction: PROGRESSIVE: ALL enemy groups are Elite.
